text: What's the most embarrassing thing you've ever done on a first date?
If you could relive one day from your past, which would it be?
Describe your ideal vacation with an unlimited budget.
What's a small thing that always makes your day better?
If animals could talk, which species would be the rudest?
What's the weirdest food combination you secretly love?
Invent a holiday that should exist but doesn't.
What would be the most boring superpower to have?
Describe the last time you laughed so hard you cried.
If you were a DJ, what would your stage name be?
What's the best advice you've ever received from a stranger?
If you had to live in any fictional world, which would you choose?
What's something you used to believe as a kid that turned out to be completely wrong?
Design a restaurant — what's the theme and signature dish?
What would happen if everyone had to tell the truth for 24 hours?
What's the most spontaneous thing you've ever done?
If you could master any skill instantly, what would it be?
What's the most meaningful compliment you've ever received?
Pitch a reality TV show that would actually be worth watching.
What rule do you think society should get rid of?
What's the hardest lesson you learned about friendship?
If you could send one message to everyone on Earth simultaneously, what would it say?
What's a belief you held strongly that you've completely changed your mind about?
Invent a new sport and explain how it would work.
If you could know the answer to any one question, what would you ask?
What do you think happens when we dream?
What's the most courageous conversation you've ever had?
Describe a moment that changed how you see the world.
Design an alien civilization — what makes them unique?
What would society look like if no one needed sleep?
What's your earliest memory of feeling truly happy?
If you could swap lives with anyone for a week, who would it be?
What's the nicest thing someone has done for you without being asked?
Create a new ice cream flavor that would be a bestseller.
What's the most interesting place you've ever been?
If you could change one law, what would it be and why?
What does your perfect Sunday look like from start to finish?
What would your autobiography be titled?
If you could have dinner with any historical figure, who and why?
What's a truth about relationships that nobody talks about?
What invention do you think will change the world in the next decade?
What's a talent you have that most people don't know about?
Write the opening line of a novel you'd want to read.
What would cities look like if cars were never invented?
What's the best deal you've ever gotten?
If you had a time machine that only went back 10 minutes, how would you use it?
What's the most important quality in a friend?
Design a board game in 30 seconds.
What would the world be like if everyone could read minds?
What's something you've never told anyone?
